<!-- generated by gitdocs -->
---
title: "Pipeline Extensions"
category: Implementation
last_updated: 2026-04-25
---

Overview
1. Exposes toggles that control which pipeline extensions the proxy enables.
2. Ensures VS Code settings actually wire into the proxy's `extensions.json` override (previous versions updated a now-removed preload wrapper and had no effect on proxy mode).

How It Works
1. `ensureProxyExtensionsConfig()` builds an `extensions` map reflecting v3.1.0 defaults.
2. For each "skip" setting, the extension inverts the user choice so a `skipX: true` results in `<extension>.enabled = false` in the override.
3. The override is written to the config path (`getProxyExtensionsConfigPath()` / typically `~/.claude/cache-fix-proxy-extensions.json`) on activate and before each spawn.
4. When a relevant setting changes, the extension restarts the managed proxy so the new config takes effect.

Configuration (settings and defaults)
- `claude-code-cache-fix.skipFingerprint` (boolean, default: `false`)
  - Controls `fingerprint-strip` (`order:100`)
- `claude-code-cache-fix.skipToolSort` (boolean, default: `false`)
  - Controls `sort-stabilization` (`order:200`)
- `claude-code-cache-fix.skipSessionStartNormalize` (boolean, default: `false`)
  - Controls `fresh-session-sort` (`order:250`)
- `claude-code-cache-fix.skipSmooshSplit` (boolean, default: `false`)
  - Controls `smoosh-split` (`order:320`) — v3.1.0 default-on
- `claude-code-cache-fix.skipContentStrip` (boolean, default: `false`)
  - Controls `content-strip` (`order:330`) — v3.1.0 default-on
- `claude-code-cache-fix.skipToolInputNormalize` (boolean, default: `false`)
  - Controls `tool-input-normalize` (`order:340`) — v3.1.0 default-on
- `claude-code-cache-fix.skipCacheControlNormalize` (boolean, default: `false`)
  - Controls `cache-control-normalize` (`order:400`)
- `claude-code-cache-fix.skipTtl` (boolean, default: `false`)
  - Controls `ttl-management` (`order:500`)
- `claude-code-cache-fix.skipDeferredToolsRestore` (boolean, default: `false`)
  - Sets env `CACHE_FIX_SKIP_DEFERRED_TOOLS_RESTORE=1` for the proxy (env-controlled feature)

Source Files
- `extension.js` (function: `ensureProxyExtensionsConfig`, restart hooks on config change)
- `package.json` (settings declarations and descriptions)

Related
- See also: ../auto-architecture/proxy-subsystem.md
- Upstream impact data: linked in `package.json` descriptions (extension-impact-guide)
